title: Format Entry Schema
description: Schema for Axis 3 format entries. Format is the structural container or output type.

domain.description: Sphere of life the writing happens in (ADR 0010). Optional until the taxonomy migration tightens it to required (decision F2). The enum mirrors tools/taxonomy.py FORMAT_DOMAINS; the family-belongs-to-domain rule is enforced by validate.py.

family.description: Structural/functional kind of writing, scoped to its domain (ADR 0010). Flat enum (mirrors tools/taxonomy.py); membership within the domain is checked by validate.py. Optional until tightened (F2).

subfamily.description: Optional third level, required once a family reaches 12 members (ADR 0010). Membership is checked by validate.py where the family enumerates subfamilies.

typical_length.description: Typical word-count range for this format

canonical_template.description: The structural template (e.g., Context/Decision/Consequences for ADR)

typical_voices.description: Voice IDs that frequently use this format

typical_tones.description: Tone IDs that frequently use this format
